name: bluetooth
title: Bluetooth
description: Vicinae bluetooth extension for managing bluetooth devices using org.bluez via dbus-next
author: Gelei

commands.name: bluetooth-on
commands.title: Bluetooth On
commands.subtitle: Power on and reconnect to last device
commands.description: Turn on Bluetooth adapter and optionally reconnect to last connected device

preferences.name: connectionToggleable
preferences.title: Connection Toggleable
preferences.description: Use a single toggle action for connect/disconnect instead of separate actions
preferences.label: Connection Toggleable
